name: marketcheck-cowork-plugin
description: Automotive market intelligence suite for dealers, appraisers, brokers, and analysts. 11 skills, 8 commands, 5 agents — powered by MarketCheck MCP server. Multi-agent architecture with paginated inventory scanning, parallel batch pricing, and concurrent market analytics. Includes dealer onboarding, daily/weekly/monthly workflow slash commands, competitive pricing, inventory analytics, market share, depreciation tracking, and deal finding. US + UK market support.
